hospitalizations.principal_dx_description: Acute myeloid leukemia, not having achieved remission
hospitalizations.reason: Induction chemotherapy with 7+3 (cytarabine/daunorubicin) plus midostaurin for newly diagnosed AML FAB M4; complicated by febrile neutropenia with E. coli bacteremia and grade 3 mucositis
Bridging consolidation with intermediate-dose cytarabine (IDAC); complicated by grade 2 bilateral cytarabine-related conjunctivitis

Myeloablative allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant (FluBu4 conditioning, 10/10 MUD); complicated by grade 3 mucositis, febrile neutropenia, mild sinusoidal obstruction syndrome, and CMV viremia on day +28

medications.frequency: twice daily, dose adjusted to target trough 8-12 ng/mL
twice daily to affected skin areas
